name: KPMG_WAF_Logs
description: Webhook LogSource for AWS WAF logs. Uses Webhook Attribute extraction on pre-parsed fields from the Lambda forwarder.

logFields.comment: WAF action: ALLOW, BLOCK, COUNT, CAPTCHA
Full ARN of the Web ACL
Rule that terminated the request evaluation
Type of terminating rule (REGULAR, RATE_BASED, GROUP)
Country code of the request origin
Log level derived from WAF action: BLOCK=warn, else=info
Resource type label (AWS WAF WebACL) sent from Lambda
Identifies log source type for queries

mappings.comment: Map to WAF Web ACL resource by ARN (custom property, not system.aws.arn which requires cloud discovery)

lambdaConfig.comment: Dedicated Lambda for WAF logs with isolated concurrency

steps: Navigate to Modules > My Module Toolbox > Add > LogSource
Add Filter: SourceName Equal waf_logs (Match ALL)
Add Log Fields using Webhook Attribute method (key=field name in LM, value=JSON key from webhook payload)
Add log_level field: Webhook Attribute, key=log_level, value=Level
Add Resource Mapping: Webhook Attribute, key=system.aws.arn, value=webaclId
